Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W509P238992

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:3 in 1 Vanity Desk with open Top Mirror,Small Make Up Vanity Set with Visible Glass Desktop,Compact Makeup Vanity with 3 Drawers,Dressing Table for Bedroom

Main Color:White

Main Material:MDF

Product Style:American Design

Number of Drawers:3 Drawers

Type of Storage Included:Drawer

Drawer Features:Ball Bearing Glides

Use Case:Bedroom

Wood Tone:White

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):19.69

Assembled Width (in.):15.75

Assembled Height (in.):50.39

Package Size

Length (in.):43.31

Product Features

  • 3 in 1 design :vanity, nightstand and chair are combined into a compact corner vanity-nightstand all in one. The vanity table also comes with a flip-up mirror, which flips open to be a simple vanity and closes to be a nightstand with great storage space, which is a more space-saving design
  • Spacious Storage Space:Equipped with a flip-top jewelry organizer, a hidden storage space for your tall bottle skin product,a drawer,a fluffy bench with a large organizer drawer that holds a large amount of makeup and jewelry,skin care products
  • Comfortable Cushion:Our matching cushion stool is soft and comfortable, very suitable for ladies to enjoy the makeup skincare process more. This bench can be placed completely under the table without taking up extra space
  • Glass Desk top:The design of glass visible tabletop allows you to see every cosmetic and jewelry under the desktop at a glance and easily find the cosmetics or jewelry you need.
